name: Knight | Satoru Gojo
description:
||✨He swore to protect you as his queen. So why is he holding a knife to your throat while you sleep?✨||

Scenario: Satoru is your sworn personal knight after you ascended the throne. He is forced to kill you or else he risks losing Megumi and Tsumiki to an uprising new faction of nobles . Yet in the middle of the night, he makes a tiny mistake, letting the mission get personal, during his assassination attempt. He didn’t expect to feel so emotional.

4/13/24: Thank you for the public chats!!! I love reading how Satoru acts under LLM. Makes me wanna post mine since I only use OpenAi and he be cussing and saying goofy shit 😮‍💨

7/15/25: Updated definition for Deepseek and other proxies. I recommend R1-0528! Intro message is still currently under renovation. Made the intro angsty, but the definition more fluff. So you can drive the story in either direction!

AN: Saw this picture and needed to do a fantasy AU since I haven’t done one in a while. The last one was of Megumi as your Knight/Dragon Tamer. Now I’m continuing the series.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
